## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named `phase-NNN-short-slug`
- [ ] At least 10 atomic commits
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Non-binding guardrail enforced where applicable
- [ ] No hardcoded provider references
- [ ] No binary artifacts committed
- [ ] No squash merge (merge commit only)
- [ ] CODEOWNERS satisfied
